entries.description: Iraq War authorization based on flawed WMD intelligence: No stockpiles found; war led to hundreds of thousands of deaths and regional destabilization
entries.causation_evidence: Senate Select Committee on Intelligence reports and Iraq Survey Group findings

entries.description: Hurricane Katrina response: Federal delays in aid, poor coordination, and inadequate evacuation planning left thousands stranded in New Orleans
entries.causation_evidence: House Select Bipartisan Committee to Investigate the Preparation for and Response to Hurricane Katrina report

entries.description: Authorization of CIA enhanced interrogation program: Waterboarding, black sites, and torture of detainees
entries.causation_evidence: Senate Select Committee on Intelligence Torture Report (2014)

entries.description: Abu Ghraib prisoner abuse scandal: Systematic torture and humiliation of detainees by U.S. forces in Iraq
entries.causation_evidence: Taguba Report and Senate Armed Services Committee findings

entries.description: Plame affair: Leak of undercover CIA agent's identity in retaliation for criticism of Iraq WMD claims
entries.causation_evidence: Special Counsel Patrick Fitzgerald investigation and court records

entries.description: Patriot Act passage: Expanded surveillance powers with minimal oversight, enabling bulk data collection on Americans
entries.causation_evidence: Privacy and Civil Liberties Oversight Board reports

entries.description: U.S. Attorneys firing scandal: Politically motivated dismissals of federal prosecutors
entries.causation_evidence: Department of Justice Inspector General report and congressional investigations

entries.description: 2008 financial crisis response: Deregulation and lax oversight contributed to housing collapse and global meltdown
Guantanamo Bay detention facility: Indefinite detention without trial and denial of habeas corpus
entries.causation_evidence: Supreme Court rulings in Rasul v. Bush and Hamdan v. Rumsfeld

entries.description: No Child Left Behind implementation failures: Unrealistic testing mandates and underfunding led to widespread school closures and teaching-to-the-test
entries.causation_evidence: Government Accountability Office reports and congressional oversight

entries.description: Medicare Part D rollout: Massive cost overruns and confusion for seniors due to complex private-plan system
entries.causation_evidence: Congressional Budget Office projections and Medicare trustees reports

entries.description: FEMA mismanagement during Katrina: Slow federal response and bureaucratic failures exacerbated human suffering
entries.causation_evidence: Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee report

entries.description: U.S. Attorney firings and politicization of DOJ: Systematic replacement of prosecutors for political reasons
entries.causation_evidence: Department of Justice Inspector General report

entries.description: PEPFAR (President's Emergency Plan for AIDS Relief): Bipartisan global AIDS initiative that saved millions of lives in Africa
entries.causation_evidence: PEPFAR official reports and independent evaluations

entries.description: Post-9/11 national unity and initial counterterrorism response: Rapid mobilization and creation of Department of Homeland Security
